_comment: WORKED EXAMPLE. Audit every source and lock the exact line/action order in paper_edit.md before writing this timeline. Replace every /ABSOLUTE/PATH/... path. Per segment: 'kind' is optional (orientation auto-detected); 'speaker' and 'beat' are review metadata; 'speed', 'audio_gain_db', and 'denoise' control pacing and pre-normalization balance; 'grade': true opts into the house relight; wide clips default to blur-fill unless 'fit': 'cover'. Blocks hard-cut consecutive runs. Transitions map to block joins in order. Anything omitted falls back to recursively merged DEFAULTS in build.py. Full schema + rules: references/render-notes.md.
title: Your punchy on-screen title
